001package net.okocraft.box.api.event.stock;
002
003import net.okocraft.box.api.model.stock.StockHolder;
004import org.jetbrains.annotations.ApiStatus;
005import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
006
007/**
008 * A {@link StockEvent} called when the stockholder has been saved.
009 *
010 * @deprecated use {@link net.okocraft.box.api.event.stockholder.StockHolderSaveEvent}
011 */
012@Deprecated(forRemoval = true)
013@ApiStatus.ScheduledForRemoval(inVersion = "4.2.0")
014public class StockSaveEvent extends StockEvent{
015
016    /**
017     * The constructor of {@link StockSaveEvent}.
018     *
019     * @param stockHolder the saved stock
020     */
021    public StockSaveEvent(@NotNull StockHolder stockHolder) {
022        super(stockHolder);
023    }
024
025    @Override
026    public String toString() {
027        return "StockSaveEvent{" +
028                "stockholder=" + getStockHolder() +
029                "}";
030    }
031}
